title: Heart of Batman
overview: In the early 1990s, a rare gathering of talent defined Batman for a generation.  Twenty-five years later, "Batman: The Animated Series" continues to inspire fans and myth-makers all over the world.  This is an in-depth look at the storytellers behind the series.
